narrative.candidateAngle: Conversational AI Engineer specializing in LLM integrations and cloud-based solutions, leveraging Python and AI technologies.

targetStory.roleLane: Conversational AI Engineer focused on LLM and cloud integration
targetStory.readerTakeaway: Proven experience in developing AI-driven applications with Python and cloud technologies, emphasizing backend services and API integrations.

primaryStory: Developed AI-powered applications using Python and FastAPI, integrating OpenAI API for enhanced functionality
Built scalable backend services and REST APIs for financial applications, emphasizing secure data handling
Designed and deployed full-stack applications with cloud technologies, ensuring reliable performance and user experience
secondaryStory: Experience with real-time data processing and analytics pipelines, showcasing automation and workflow optimization
narrative.summaryGoal: Highlight experience in AI-driven application development and backend services, emphasizing Python and cloud technologies while integrating relevant JD terms.

summaryDecision.reason: The summary connects the candidate's experience with the target role, emphasizing relevant skills and projects.

skillsStrategy: Categories: Languages, Frameworks, Data Tools, Focus Areas
Lead: Python, FastAPI, AI integration, cloud technologies
Supporting: PostgreSQL, React, automation, API development
Trim last sparingly—only duplicates, narrative avoid, or clearly different‑realm fluff; keep same‑role‑family breadth (demote trailing, do not slash for JD keyword fit).

sectionStrategy.summary: Show summary to connect experience with target role
sectionStrategy.experience: Focus on hero experience with relevant skills
sectionStrategy.projects: Highlight hero projects with a focus on AI and backend development
sectionStrategy.skills: Organize skills to reflect core competencies for the role
sectionStrategy.education: Light—credentials frozen; trim highlights only if they sharpen scan.

layoutRationale: Summary connects candidate's experience to the target role

selectionRationale: Focused on the strongest evidence that aligns with the target role

rewriteGoals: Land BitGo: Emphasize backend services and API development for financial applications
Land Taylor.io: Highlight AI integration and real-time data processing capabilities
avoid: No claims of direct experience with healthcare or unsupported technologies like Azure.
narrative.alignmentGuidance: Adjacent fit: bridge from proven evidence into the target role. Use transferable language, but do not claim the candidate already owns JD-only duties.
